action.reasoning: Observation: The backward pass fails because the computation graph is broken - likely in the resynth/ISTFT step. Analysis: Instead of computing loss in waveform domain (which requires differentiable ISTFT), I should compute loss in the spectral domain - compare the enhanced magnitude spectrum to the clean magnitude spectrum. This avoids the ISTFT issue entirely. The generator outputs a mask applied to log1p(noisy_mag), and I can compare this to log1p(clean_mag). Decision: Rewrite training to use spectral domain loss - compute clean STFT magnitude, apply log1p, and compare to the enhanced features from the generator.
